title: Perezia vanillosma

Perezia vanillosma belongs to the genus Perezia, which is a group of plants that are primarily found in the Americas. The species is further classified into its kingdom, phylum, and class as Plantae, Angiospermophyta, and Dicotyledonae, respectively. Perezia vanillosma is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Campanulaceae family.
